
### reorder buffer: on rename 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/ooo/texfig/branch-mispred-reorder-buffer-on-rename.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/ooo/texfig/branch-mispred-reorder-buffer-on-rename.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/ooo/texfig/branch-mispred-reorder-buffer-on-rename.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/ooo/texfig/branch-mispred-reorder-buffer-on-rename.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/ooo/texfig/branch-mispred-reorder-buffer-on-rename.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}


:::


### reorder buffer: on commit 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/ooo/texfig/branch-mispred-reorder-buffer-on-commit.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/ooo/texfig/branch-mispred-reorder-buffer-on-commit.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/ooo/texfig/branch-mispred-reorder-buffer-on-commit.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/ooo/texfig/branch-mispred-reorder-buffer-on-commit.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/ooo/texfig/branch-mispred-reorder-buffer-on-commit.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}


:::


### reorder buffer: commit mispredict (one way) 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/ooo/texfig/branch-mispred-reorder-buffer-commit-mispredict-one-way.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/ooo/texfig/branch-mispred-reorder-buffer-commit-mispredict-one-way.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/ooo/texfig/branch-mispred-reorder-buffer-commit-mispredict-one-way.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/ooo/texfig/branch-mispred-reorder-buffer-commit-mispredict-one-way.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}


:::


### better? alternatives  {.smaller}


* can take snapshots of register map on each branch 

   * don't need to reconstruct the table
   * (but how to efficiently store them)

* can reconstruct register map before we commit the branch instruction 

   * need to let reorder buffer be accessed even more?

* can track more/different information in reorder buffer
